ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the section belongs to */,
  "section_name" TEXT /* Name of the section */,
  "section_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the section */,
  "section_order" INTEGER /* Order of the section within the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sections_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subsections" (
  "subsection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subsection */,
  "section_id" INTEGER /* ID of the section the subsection belongs to */,
  "subsection_name" TEXT /* Name of the subsection */,
  "subsection_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the subsection */,
  "subsection_order" INTEGER /* Order of the subsection within the section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subsection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subsections_section_id FOREIGN KEY ("section_id") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "subsection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subsection the document belongs to */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., PDF, DOCX) */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., draft, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_subsection_id FOREIGN KEY ("subsection_id") REFERENCES subsections ("subsection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drawings" (
  "drawing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drawing */,
  "subsection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subsection the drawing belongs to */,
  "drawing_name" TEXT /* Name of the drawing */,
  "drawing_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the drawing */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the drawing */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the drawing (e.g., DWG, PDF) */,
  "drawing_status" TEXT /* Status of the drawing (e.g., draft, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drawing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drawings_subsection_id FOREIGN KEY ("subsection_id") REFERENCES subsections ("subsection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., project manager, architect, contractor) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document or drawing */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "drawing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drawing being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document or drawing was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_drawing_id FOREIGN KEY ("drawing_id") REFERENCES drawings ("drawing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "approval_processes" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each approval process */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being approved */,
  "drawing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drawing being approved */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the document or drawing */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the document or drawing was approved */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the approver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approval_processes_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approval_processes_drawing_id FOREIGN KEY ("drawing_id") REFERENCES drawings ("drawing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_approval_processes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "drawing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drawing */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the document or drawing */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES documents ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_drawing_id FOREIGN KEY ("drawing_id") REFERENCES drawings ("drawing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_user_roles" (
  "project_user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project user role */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., project manager, architect, contractor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_user_roles_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., document uploaded, drawing approved) */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
